subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath revealed the hidden and brought forth that which was treasured up, whereby the mysteries of what was and what shall be have been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر المکنون و ابرز المخزون الذی به ظهر اسرار ما کان و ما
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @call to action, @unity; oneness of humanity, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God
